description_long: This is a modern all-in-one desktop computer featuring a large, flat widescreen monitor with a slim profile and minimal bezels. The display is supported by a wide, angular pedestal stand that provides stability and a contemporary look. The front of the monitor is dominated by a black screen with a thin, light gray lower bezel, and a keyboard and mouse are positioned in front of it. The screen displays an error message indicating a boot disk failure, suggesting the device is powered on but not fully operational. The rear of the monitor is sleek and unadorned, with a subtle central seam and a small diamond-shaped accent. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible buttons or ports, and the materials appear to be primarily matte and glossy plastics.
description: A sleek, modern all-in-one desktop computer with a large, thin monitor, angular pedestal stand, and matching keyboard and mouse. The design is minimalist, with a black screen, light gray bezel, and no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a smooth, dark back panel with a central seam and a diamond-shaped accent near the stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the monitor and the angular pedestal stand, with the keyboard and mouse visible in front.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large black screen with a thin light gray bezel, keyboard, and mouse; an error message is visible on the screen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the monitor and the arrangement of the keyboard and mouse.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, especially on the top and sides, with a slightly thicker light gray strip at the bottom. It has a smooth, matte finish with sharp corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, angular pedestal base made of dark plastic or metal, providing stable support with a geometric, modern design. No visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
